title: App shell + responsive scaling + Poki SDK lifecycle

reboot.note: PLAN+ANCHOR: GameShell (Engine+StateManager+CANONICAL_PIPELINE wrapper, same P8 Playtest.ts precedent), ViewportModel (pure letterbox/DPR), InputCapture (pure key-state), PortalSdk+PortalLifecycle (Poki lifecycle)

plan.note: ANCHOR complete: dependency-mapped Engine/StateManager/CANONICAL_PIPELINE (P1/P4 seams); render/platform/ deferred (dm-0103)

anchor.note: IMPLEMENT: render/shell/*.ts + 4 test files (24 tests); fixed 2 RenderIsolation false-positives (dm-0102/fetch-already-fixed-at-S9.7)

verify.note: INTEGRATE: PKG updated in-change (render/shell real node + its dependency edges; hash s9-b8d4a0 -> s9-c9e5b1); ledger at dm-0103

integrate.note: REPORT: S9.8 -> COMPLETED. REQ-170/171/001/002 gain their S9.8 share; REQ-174's generic rewardedBreak hook exists via PortalSdk (P10 still owns the actual skip flow).

acceptance.criterion: GameShell wraps Engine/StateManager/CANONICAL_PIPELINE; PortalSdk seam + NullPortalSdk; projection-purity proven bit-identical to headless drive
ViewportModel: pure letterbox/DPR-cap[1,2]/fullscreen math; InputCapture: shouldPreventDefault for space/arrows, edge-triggered InputFrame mapping
GameShell + PortalLifecycle establish the init->loadingFinished->gameplayStart lifecycle Poki's 'first 30s' retention model depends on
gameLoadingFinished ordering + async-tiered assets (S9.7) keep loads short; no text-heavy tutorial surface added
